title: [Control Systems] Phoenix Contact Security Advisory (AV26-546)
description: On June 3, 2026, Phoenix Contact published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following products:
products: CHARX SEC-3150  firmware version prior to 1.9.0
CHARX SEC-3050  firmware version prior to 1.9.0
CHARX SEC-3000  firmware version prior to 1.9.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
